title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: CPU/GPU runner for Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs with a built-in model registry and simple CLI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a native LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model—multi-chat, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: chainlit/chainlit
summary: Python chat-app framework with built-in Ollama support; build shareable LLM apps in minutes.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home-Assistant custom component exposing Ollama models as conversation agents for local smart-home AI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama for embeddings + generation and Chroma for vector storage.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI client for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a Copilot-style inline code completer.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside a buffer, generate code or refactor selections.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and PVC support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming, dependency-injection helpers and minimal API sample.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI sidebar powered by any Ollama model for note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into threads with slash-command model switching.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama into channels/DMs with thread-aware context and model picker.
